EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to update disk "{object.value}" of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Disk "{object.value}" is added to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed a disk from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to add a disk to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to perform a CD operation in virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} ejected a CD from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} inserted CD "{object.value}" into virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove a disk from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated disk "{object.value}" of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to insert CD "{object.value}" into virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} is adding disk "{object.value}" to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to eject a CD from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
